title: The Magnificent Ones
overview: Nanako has her first day at Seiran Academy.

title: The Glass Slippers
overview: Mariko looks out for Nanako before class, and shoves Tomoko out of the way when she finds Nanako. Fukiko comes to Nanako's class and announces three Sorority candidates.

title: Nanako, Disqualified?
overview: An insulting note is posted about Nanako's candidacy for the Sorority on the school bulletin board.

title: The Music Box
overview: Despite missing the selection party, Nanako has her interview, and humiliates herself.

title: Thorns of Suspicion and Doubt
overview: Nanako sees Kaoru stop Rei from taking some pills.

title: Lost and Alone
overview: The bullying continues. Nanako's gym uniform is stolen and cut to shreds, and Tomoko won't lend Nanako hers.

title: The Darkness in the Clock Tower
overview: Depressed from her classmates' bullying, Nanako goes to the school's clock tower to spend some time alone.

title: I Want You
overview: Mariko tries to warn Tomoko off Nanako again, but Kaoru comes by and stops her.

title: Relapse, Broken Heart
overview: Kaoru collapses from chest pains, so Nanako tries to fetch painkillers from Rei.

title: Mariko...
overview: Mariko refuses to eat anything until Nanako forgives her, but Nanako is giving her the silent treatment.

title: Under the Elm Tree...
overview: The Sorority members have a special study session at Fukiko's house.

title: The Scar
overview: Nanako calls Kaoru to help take care of Rei.

title: A Tale of Double Suicide
overview: Rei is well enough to go back to school. She confronts Fukiko, but is made docile with a few words.

title: The Secret Door
overview: Nanako desperately tries to escape from Rei, but fails.

title: Fukiko, the Sea Rumbles
overview: A Sorority member named Junko Nakaya fails one of her exams due to having been seriously ill, so Fukiko orders her to resign.

title: Comeback
overview: It is Kaoru's first basketball game since her illness, and she is determined to win.

title: Postscript
overview: Nanako realizes that she has fallen in love with Rei, but is too nervous to say anything.

title: Into the Dream
overview: After Nanako accidentally misses her bus stop, Rei takes her to the park.

title: The Transient Game
overview: Rei refuses to react after hearing Nanako's confession and begins to intentionally avoid her, breaking Nanako's heart.

title: The Gardening Shears
overview: Nanako and Tomoko decide to go to Takehiko's university fair.

title: The University Festival
overview: Nanako, Tomoko, and Mariko go the University Fair with Takehiko and Takashi, Fukiko's older brother.

title: A Summer Day's Serenade
overview: Mariko and Nanako are invited by Fukiko to her country house for the weekend to help her prepare for her birthday party.

title: The Forbidden Gift
overview: Home from the lake house, Fukiko and Rei visit Ms. Asaka's grave on the anniversary of her death, three years ago.

title: Encore
overview: Confused by the events of the party, Rei inquires of Takashi as to why the song upset Fukiko.

title: The Scarlet Lipstick
overview: Rei reminisces about the first time she met Fukiko, remembering how, even as a child, her pride had still been admirable.

title: Proof: Snow for the Two of Us Alone
overview: Rei reflects on that double suicide pact that she and Fukiko made shortly after Rei's mother committed suicide.

title: Mariko's Incident of Bloodshed
overview: Mariko's parents are divorcing and she is traumatized, spending the night at Nanako's home to try coping.

title: The Christmas Candles
overview: Everyone desperately looks for the missing Mariko, fearing for the worst.

title: The Student Assembly
overview: At the Student Assembly, Kaoru asks for the abolition of the Sorority.

title: The Petition
overview: Two Sorority members, Ogiwara and Komabayashi, persuade Aya's friends, Miyuki and Megumi, to steal and burn the petitions.

title: The Bad Apple
overview: The Sorority members are getting scared as the Petition gains movement and their own members begin signing it.

title: Pride: The Last Meeting
overview: Fukiko continues to pretend that nothing is wrong.

title: Soaring
overview: Rei dreams of her mother's death, in which Ms. Asaka reveals that Fukiko is her child as well.

title: Ablution
overview: Nanako waits for Rei to pick her up for their date, but soon, everyone finds out about Rei.

title: The Shore of Dreams
overview: The school attends Rei's funeral. Fukiko accepts all of the guests with dignity.

title: Fireflies, Burning with Love...
overview: Two weeks after Rei dies, it is the summer holidays.

title: Merry-Go-Round
overview: Kaoru tells Nanako that she broke up with Takehiko because of her illness and mastectomy, and that Nanako is really Takehiko's stepsister.

title: Yes
overview: Takehiko is about to leave for Germany, so Kaoru intends to leave him behind for good.

title: A Lingering Fragrance
overview: Fukiko has a hallucination where Rei encourages her to find true love.
